name: tumble-dry
description: Polish written work AND code through simulated public contact — parallel reviewer personas, assumption audit, voice-preserving editor (prose) or style-anchored editor (code), AST-aware drift, converges on material findings.
author: Paul Logan

scripts.test: node tests/harden.test.cjs && node tests/validate-plugin.test.cjs && node tests/format.test.cjs && node tests/code.test.cjs && node tests/roundtrip.test.cjs
